# Elite Finish Detailing

> Mobile car detailing in Omaha, NE. Interior, exterior, and full Elite Finish packages delivered to your driveway. Owned by Nixon Thelen and Blake Schmidt. Cash on completion, no hidden fees.

## Services
- [Mobile Car Detailing Services](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#services): Exterior detail, interior detail, and Elite Finish (full combo) for cars, trucks, SUVs, and vans.

## Pricing
- [Pricing Table](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#pricing): Flat-rate pricing by vehicle type. Cars $40–$100, Trucks $50–$120, SUVs $60–$140, Vans $70–$150. Exotic and classic cars quoted individually.

## Service Area
- [Omaha Metro Coverage](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#faq): Omaha, Elkhorn, Papillion, Gretna, Bennington, Council Bluffs, and Shelby. Travel fees: Free (Shelby area), +$10 (10–20 miles), +$20 (20+ miles).

## FAQ
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#faq): Self-contained water and power, detail timing (45 min–3 hrs), service differences, neighborhoods served, cash-only payment, exotic car care.

## Contact
- [Book Online](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#book): Blake Schmidt (402) 278-4466, Nixon Thelen (402) 679-7198, bookings@elitefinishomaha.com. Mon–Sat 8 AM–6 PM.

## Optional
- [Privacy Policy](https://elitefinishomaha.com/privacy.html): Data handling and privacy information.
